message:
sync beads: add remaining feature gap issues

Added issues for minor remaining functionality gaps:
- bd-t2u: Decimal precision/scale field options
- bd-1x9: Full regex validation support

These are both P3 (backlog) as workarounds exist:
- Decimal: use sql_type override
- Regex: use custom validators

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
